description: Graphic. The photographic upper two-thirds shows a low-angle close-up of a person in blue jeans and black work boots climbing the metal airstairs of an aircraft; a red handrail is visible at left and a red stripe runs along the aircraft fuselage and door. The person's ankles are bound by a metal chain connecting the two boots. The lower third is overlaid with bold typography: the word 'Leave' set very large in red serif type, followed by 'on your OWN terms.' in black serif (with 'OWN' larger), and below in smaller blue all-caps sans-serif: 'AVOID THE JAIL CELL. AVOID THE HUMILIATION.' A dark navy-blue footer bar carries the circular DHS/ICE seal and the 'ICE' wordmark on the left, with white text on the right reading 'Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation'.
notable_text: Leave on your OWN terms. / AVOID THE JAIL CELL. AVOID THE HUMILIATION. / Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation
